programmes.show_description: Rousing action-filled drama starring James Earl Jones. A ragtag US martial arts squad must learn the value of teamwork as they take on the masterful Koreans at the world championships.
Claustrophobic survival thriller with Ryan Reynolds. A man buried alive in the Iraqi desert tries to escape with nothing but a lighter, a mobile phone and 90 minutes of oxygen left.
Horror Channel returns soon.

Two Chihuahuas are found dead after a neighbour's American Bullies allegedly bust through a doggie door and attack them.
A woman accuses her landlord of inappropriate behaviour; she denies owing him for rent and breaking her lease.
The Judge discovers an intriguing story of alleged fraud and vandalism when an unsuspecting motorist calls for help.
After a couple is asked to pay up for an unauthorised tenant, they complain about leaks, mould and sewage issues.
A woman claims she sent racy pictures of herself in a negligee with another man to her ex-boyfriend and that's why she's being sued for his impounded car which she totalled.
Inspection of a man's handwriting, defamation of character and an alleged assault come into play when ex-friends fight over repossession of a truck.
A home-based Internet business, a divorce, and an ex-employee caught in the middle come into play when ex-roommates fight over rent.
Claiming she made over $7,000 in car payments, a young woman sues her ex-stepfather after he repossesses her vehicle.
The Judge questions a woman's courtroom attitude when she is sued by her ex-best friend for the value of a car and her personal belongings.

Jenna Nannetti and Mike Simons fell in love. But their love story is cut short when Jenna is found dead. An investigation reveals a web of affairs and betrayal.
When Dr Gulam Moonda is shot on the side of the road, his wife says a masked man held them up for money, but was she the real mastermind of the crime?
Correspondent Erin Moriarty tracks down the accused killer of a decorated military pilot in Brazil - will the United States get her sent back to face a jury?
After a man was murdered, fingerprints and surveillance video helped investigators apprehend the killer within twelve hours.
When Bruce Miller was shot dead, the crime scene was almost pristine, but when experts examine the victim's wife's computer, they found the evidence he needed to make a conviction.

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Walker and the Rangers find themselves in the middle of an IRA conflict.
Action comedy based on true events, with Tom Cruise. A pilot recruited as a CIA courier in the 1980s uses the opportunity to set up a profitable sideline trafficking drugs for a cartel.
Action thriller with Bruce Willis. A bank manager teams up with his ex-cop neighbour to hunt down a notorious group of thieves who killed his friend in a botched heist.
Tense action thriller. A retired thief is persuaded to carry out one last diamond heist by her former partner, only to get mixed up in a murder and hunted by an assassin.
Action adventure with Ben Freeman. With his true love captured by the Sheriff of Nottingham, the legendary Robin Hood and his crew of outlaws execute a daring rescue to save her.

When a retired pest control worker sprays insect killer on a shared tree, his neighbours claim they suffered serious respiratory injury.
A writer claims she submitted articles that her editor never paid her for; he says the writing was not factual, and that he wasn't paid by his clients.
A woman demands thousands in payback for a valuable truck; her friend says she traded an antique, hand carved oak table for the vehicle.
A daycare provider says her attempt to improve a playground resulted in substandard concrete work; she sues for damages.
A senior citizen is accused of assaulting another senior at a Ladies' Auxiliary VFW meeting and is escorted out of her hotel room by police. She sues for damages.
After meeting a mechanic at a bowling alley, a woman ends up suing him for allegedly selling her broken-down BMW without her permission; he claims he was forced to get rid of it.
A mother's allegedly inappropriate behaviour with her daughter's fiancé, drinking problems and damage caused by Chihuahuas come into play in a fight over fishing poles.
After ruining her credit, a woman demands that her boyfriend's adult son return the car she co-signed for him or give her money to pay it off.
A woman claims her ex-boyfriend slashed her tyres but fails to prove a word of her story; he is still in the hot seat for alleged theft of her property.

Lora Sinner wanted a new start and new friends, but newfound friendships turn to jealousy and they stage Lora's 'accidental' death during a camping trip.
When Landy Martinez is found dead in his home, an investigation reveals a toxic past relationship that wasn't ready to be over.
A retired UPS driver reveals new details about cult leader David Koresh and what led up to the deadly standoff with law enforcement nearly 25 years ago.
When a teacher disappears, his wife receives letters saying that he needed a clean break. Investigators suspect foul play, but without a body, the case would be difficult to prove.
A teenager is killed by her parents. They claim it was in self-defence, but forensic evidence indicates otherwise. Definite proof comes from an unlikely source.

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. In another Hayes Cooper adventure, Mormons and their wagon train must be defended from outlaws.
Action thriller with Gerard Butler. A submarine skipper sent to investigate the torpedoing of US and Russian vessels discovers the Russian president has been kidnapped by a rogue general.
Electrifying all-action sequel! ''Action Man' Jason Statham returns as Stelios to track down a Chinese mobster who has stolen his heart and replaced it with a battery-powered ticker.
